evals.name: patch-bug-fix-external-link-rel
evals.prompt: I've made a fix in this repo. Please add a changeset describing the change. The repo is at FIXTURE_PATH.
evals.expected_output: A `.changeset/<slug>.md` file with `"notion-as-a-cms": patch` frontmatter and a one-paragraph message explaining that external links now include `rel="noopener noreferrer"` to fix the security issue. The slug should reference noopener/rel/external-link. No code example needed (mechanical 1-line fix).

evals.name: minor-feature-divider-atom
evals.prompt: Please add a changeset for the changes I just made in this repo. The repo is at FIXTURE_PATH.
evals.expected_output: A `.changeset/<slug>.md` file with `"notion-as-a-cms": minor` frontmatter and a message describing the new Divider atom and that it adds rendering support for Notion's `divider` block type via NotionRenderer. Slug should reference divider/block/atom.

evals.name: major-breaking-rename-meta-title-property
evals.prompt: Generate a changeset for the changes in FIXTURE_PATH.
evals.expected_output: A `.changeset/<slug>.md` file with `"notion-as-a-cms": major` frontmatter, a message that explicitly calls out the BREAKING change (the Notion DB column renamed from `Meta title` to `SEO title`) and includes a code example or before/after mapping so consumers of the boilerplate know what they need to rename in their Notion DB.
